underlying_goal: Fix dashboard wallet/task counts showing incorrect data, debug task creation flow, and plan a major refactoring to unify preset and custom task templates into a single system
friction_detail: Initial fix used wrong API endpoint (useTasks calling /tasks instead of /task-templates), and the cache invalidation fix still didn't resolve the task creation display issue because the underlying architecture had preset tasks going to a completely different table with no frontend endpoint.
brief_summary: User reported broken dashboard stats and task creation issues; Claude fixed the wallet count and identified the wrong API endpoint for tasks, but the task creation display issue revealed a deeper architectural split that required a full refactoring plan rather than a quick fix.
